# zillizcloud_volume (Resource)

Manages a volume in a Zilliz Cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    zillizcloud = {
      source = "zilliztech/zillizcloud"
    }
  }
}

provider "zillizcloud" {
}

resource "zillizcloud_volume" "managed" {
  project_id  = "proj-example"
  region_id   = "aws-us-west-2"
  volume_name = "terraform-managed-volume"
}

resource "zillizcloud_volume" "external" {
  project_id             = "proj-example"
  region_id              = "aws-us-west-2"
  volume_name            = "terraform-external-volume"
  type                   = "EXTERNAL"
  storage_integration_id = "storage-integration-example"
  path                   = "terraform/external-volume/"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Project ID.
- `region_id` (String) Cloud region ID.
- `volume_name` (String) Volume name.

### Optional

- `path` (String) Storage path. If specified, it must be empty or end with '/'.
- `storage_integration_id` (String) Storage integration ID for external volumes.
- `type` (String) Volume type. Valid values are MANAGED and EXTERNAL.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Volume creation time.
- `id` (String) Volume name used as the Terraform resource ID.
- `status` (String) Current volume status.
